phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada del museo?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEHL moo-SEH-oh

likely_response.local: En Puerta 9, junto a la tienda oficial.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN poo-EHR-tah HOON-toh AH LAH tee-EHN-dah oh-fee-thee-AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Over there, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Over there, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: EHN poo-EHR-tah HOON-toh AH LAH tee-EHN-dah oh-fee-thee-AHL
responses.local: En Puerta 9, junto a la tienda oficial.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the players' tunnel is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme cómo llegar al túnel de jugadores?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿Poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh KOH-moh yeh-GAHR ahl TOO-nehl deh hoo-gah-DOH-rehs?

likely_response.local: Siga recto tras el museo, puerta 123.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS EHL moo-SEH-oh poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight to the technical zone.

responses.english: Go straight to the technical zone.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS EHL moo-SEH-oh poo-EHR-tah
responses.local: Siga recto tras el museo, puerta 123.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the trophy exhibition is
phrases.text_local: ¿Me puede decir dónde está la exposición de trofeos?
phrases.pronunciation: meh PWEH-deh deh-SEER DOHN-deh es-TAH lah eks-poh-see-see-OHN deh troh-FEH-ohs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del museo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL moo-SEH-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the museum, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the museum, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL moo-SEH-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo del museo, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the locker room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo llego a los vestuarios del equipo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lohs behs-TWAH-ree-ohs del eh-kee-POH?

likely_response.local: Zona restringida, solo accesible en tour guiado.
likely_response.pronunciation: THOH-nah reh-streen-HEE-dah SOH-loh ahth-theh-SEEB-leh EHN toh-OOR g-ee-AH-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Restricted zone, only accessible on guided tour.

responses.english: Restricted zone, only accessible on guided tour.
responses.phonetic: THOH-nah reh-streen-HEE-dah SOH-loh ahth-theh-SEEB-leh EHN toh-OOR g-ee-AH-doh
responses.local: Zona restringida, solo accesible en tour guiado.
